sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13077" key="a)polino/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπολῐν-όω</orth>, <sense id="n13077.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tie up with a thread,</tr_> of surgeons, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:6:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
